rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2054.158, which governs a quality assurance team for state agency information resources technology projects. No overlap exists.
quote:
The comptroller, state auditor, Legislative Budget Board, and department shall:
(1) create a quality assurance team to perform the duties specified in this chapter and other law;
_note: Rule text concerns IT project quality assurance; no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
